testcase.name: test_03_track_location_missing_gps
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_geofencing_feature.py:109: in setup assert login_res.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_res.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
